verdict_reasoning: OR1A1 is a 7-transmembrane GPCR (olfactory receptor) with classical multipass TM topology: extracellular N-terminus, 7 transmembrane helices, and three extracellular loops. As a functional odorant receptor, it is stably integrated into the plasma membrane with exposed extracellular loops that interact with odorant molecules in the extracellular space.
